title: Lustro shared wire envelopes (v1)
description: Self-contained bundle of the shared envelope shapes reused by every /api/v1 route. Served at GET /api/v1/_schema. Authoritative copies live in the wire-protocol/v1 repository directory; the definitions are inlined here so the served document resolves without external $ref fetches.

errorEnvelope.title: Error envelope
errorEnvelope.description: Uniform error body returned by every /api/v1/* route on failure.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.

field.description: Optional name of the offending request field.

cursorEnvelope.title: Cursor envelope
cursorEnvelope.description: Live-polling envelope. Cursor is opaque; echo it back on the next poll; treat unknown status values as "reset". This generic envelope permits additional properties so observable endpoints may extend it (e.g. the Network tab adds a top-level "state" object); a tab schema may pin those extensions.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor token; advances on every server-side mutation.

status.description: delta = items are the authoritative current list (omit => unchanged); unchanged = no change; reset = replace the whole list with items.

items.description: Present for reset (and delta when changed).

state.description: Optional endpoint-specific observable state (e.g. Network's paused/overwriteMode/throttleDelayMs). Tab schemas pin the exact shape.

pagination.title: List pagination envelope
pagination.description: Standard list-response shape for collection endpoints.

nextCursor.description: Opaque next-page cursor, or null when exhausted.

protocolVersion.description: Wire-protocol minor version (major lives in the path).

tabs.description: Registered tabs that expose a schema.
